name: SN74HC165 I/O Expander (shift register)
description: The SN74HC165 component allows you to use SN74HC165 shift registers as I/O expanders (Input only, use SN74HC595 for outputs) ([datasheet](https://www.ti.com/lit/ds/symlink/sn74hc165.pdf)) in ESPHome. It uses 3 wires (optionally 4) for communication.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this SN74HC165 component.

config_entries.label: Clock Inhibit Pin
config_entries.description: Pin connected to SN74HC165 Clock Inhibit (CLK INH) pin. The use of it is optional, as it can be directly connected to ground.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Clock Pin
config_entries.description: Pin connected to SN74HC165 Clock (CLK) pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Load Pin
config_entries.description: Pin connected to SN74HC165 Load input (SH/LD) pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Sr Count
config_entries.description: Number of daisy-chained shift registers, up-to 256. Defaults to `1`.
